speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah. So I'm going to need you to roll an investigation check. This is your ability to go around the town and find, through the midst of chaos of Emon trying to repair itself, somebody who can sell you the supplies necessary.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Or, I can give you money.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It is important for him to express himself.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I have passed out money lately, before, I think.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I throw myself off of things for this one, she can't give me 50 gold pieces.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How about everybody gets a thousand gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, everybody take a thousand gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do I have this ability? I feel like I remember it, but I'm looking through--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'm pretty sure you do! I think you have a disguise kit. It's not an ability per se.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's me, can I use it on a robot?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: By the way, Liam, if you don't have this ability, I want to see this even more.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Just bluff your way through it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, because Imposter is the ability to mimic somebody else. It has nothing to do-- A disguise kit is what you're using.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And I've always had a disguise kit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Because I did something back in the home game, I did something.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you've done a couple of things. But it's not an ability you have.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, you do have an ability, but it's only for you, it's not for Doty.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You own a cardboard box with a bunch of stuff.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So here's what we do. First and foremost, you have to go to the town and gather supplies because your disguise kit is designed for very small prosthetics and things. This is a large endeavor.
